'''wanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kerygmatically|kerygmatically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kerygmatically|kerygmatically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wanate|wanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wanatesher|wanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wanatesherĂ«m|wanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wanatero|wanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wanateshĂ«|wanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wanateshĂ«m|wanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwanatero|gokiwanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwanateshĂ«|gokiwanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanateshĂ«m|gokiwanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowanankerom|gowanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowanankeshĂ«|gowanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanankeshĂ«m|gowanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowanankeya|gowanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wanaterom|wanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wanatemu|wanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wanateya|wanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwanaterom|gokiwanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanatemu|gokiwanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwanateya|gokiwanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wananate|wananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wananatesher|wananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wananatesherĂ«m|wananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wananatero|wananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wananateshĂ«|wananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wananateshĂ«m|wananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwananatero|gokiwananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwananateshĂ«|gokiwananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwananateshĂ«m|gokiwananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowananankerom|gowananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowananankeshĂ«|gowananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowananankeshĂ«m|gowananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowananankeya|gowananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wananaterom|wananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wananatemu|wananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wananateya|wananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwananaterom|gokiwananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwananatemu|gokiwananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwananateya|gokiwananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠte|wĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠtesher|wĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠtero|wĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠnĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠterom|wĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠtemu|wĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠteya|wĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠnĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠnĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafnafte|wafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafnaftesher|wafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafnaftesherĂ«m|wafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafnaftero|wafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafnafteshĂ«|wafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafnafteshĂ«m|wafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafnaftero|gokiwafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafnafteshĂ«|gokiwafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafnafteshĂ«m|gokiwafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafnafnkerom|gowafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafnafnkeshĂ«|gowafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafnafnkeshĂ«m|gowafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafnafnkeya|gowafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafnafterom|wafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafnaftemu|wafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafnafteya|wafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafnafterom|gokiwafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafnaftemu|gokiwafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafnafteya|gokiwafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
